name: Ningbo Techmation Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Techmation Co., Ltd. offers industrial automation solutions to the plastic machinery industry in China and internationally. It provides industrial automation products, including plastic machine control systems, hydraulic servo energy saving systems, extension modules, and other auxiliary equipment; industrial software products comprising Internet of Things platform, intelligent maintenance systems, plastic manufacturing network management system software, and Linux-based Internet of Things products; and robot products and new energy products. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.
